3ba0fbf3-62a3-4882-965d-1378256f29f0.Text:
This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} can only target the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} or allies who have enemies adjacent to them.
Until the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g}'s next turn, all {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} made by the target deal additional damage equal to {uip|BonusDamage|b509a3ee5ab44253b4b859dd5f3dbffb} multiplied by the number of enemies adjacent to the target when this ability is used.
Melee attacks cost -1 AP (minimum 1) and the target can make an additional attack while under this condition.
The target also gains +{uip|BonusParryReduction|b509a3ee5ab44253b4b859dd5f3dbffb}% parry reduction and +{uip|BonusPercentDamage|b509a3ee5ab44253b4b859dd5f3dbffb}% bonus damage.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g}, they immediately make an {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attack of opportunity{/g} against an adjacent enemy, targeting the one with the lowest remaining {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}.

0bef0515-6b82-4ebe-b509-52096ab06e57.Text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} uses {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g} or {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g}, this ability costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

128181fd-09e5-4577-afc5-139af211780a.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} increases an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} by +{uip|ResolveBonus|32c0e0539f8548b08780089f8006f54a}.
Their damage is increased by {uip|DamageBonus|32c0e0539f8548b08780089f8006f54a}% and critical chance increased by {unit_stat|Resolve}% until the end of combat.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g}, they will start their next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} with +1 additional {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}action point{/g}.

77e86ef4-93c4-439b-b9f4-b93b5b96befc.Text:
For one round, the target's attacks will ignore {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}, have double the effective distance, -50% recoil, an additional {uip|HitChance|3a4d9ccff9cf40bd88fa018e05ec550d}% hit chance and a bonus {uip|Penetration|3a4d9ccff9cf40bd88fa018e05ec550d}% armor penetration.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g}, these attacks will ignore enemy block and {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}. Additionally, the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from these attacks cannot be reduced below {uip|MimimumDamage|3a4d9ccff9cf40bd88fa018e05ec550d}% for any reason.

1d5e3a4b-0889-4d23-9d62-f59f6f0db5aa.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} forces an ally to fully push themselves, increasing their {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} by +{uip|BonusStats|9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Additionally, all of the Officer's {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} can be applied to the target of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g} from any distance.
A character who becomes the target of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g} cannot be targeted by this ability again for 1 round.

da4856fc-0dd4-4a0f-9d65-145f305b1a4a.Text:
The Officer encourages an ally, who immediately recovers from {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} effects.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g}, they also gain +{uip|TemporaryWounds|083057fc1a6b47f29ea0409337135030} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g}, +{uip|BonusArmor|083057fc1a6b47f29ea0409337135030}% armor and +{uip|BonusDeflection|083057fc1a6b47f29ea0409337135030} deflection.

445fe3e6-606c-48e1-b549-c8ef42937c3e.Text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} uses an Officer {g|Encyclopedia:Career}archetype{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} that does not grant an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} in one round, the Officer gains the {g|f:f02ddb75448343d8a867fbd7a725ec93}stand witness{/g} effect.

aed5a5d1-9a2d-4e2f-953d-3536b9342f68.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} gains +{uip|InitiativeBonus|58073019ae10412e9509b6ac97006bf1} Initiative and deals an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|58073019ae10412e9509b6ac97006bf1}% {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to enemies that have not yet acted this combat.
For the first round of combat, they will receive a +{uip|AllBonus|58073019ae10412e9509b6ac97006bf1}% bonus to armour, armour penetration, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}, critical damage, parry chance, +1 AP and +4 MP.

a2ad8f02-3a53-42d6-ba4e-aa1c7264cbd8.Text: {g|f:5707cdc822e742f187d54627ae6ef4f9}Take Aim!{/g} also increases the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the next ranged attack by +30%. This bonus is increased by +2% for each cell between the attacker and the target.

f0bdf9af-8099-4c8d-a2ae-9d1338ba9aeb.Text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} makes an attack, they gain +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, +5 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}, and +3% critical damage until the end of combat.

37d374be-3f91-4329-bb36-9ea7f862653a.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} with full {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}. During the extra {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there is no attack limit. The Officer may use this ability on themselves but it will not trigger an extra turn or refresh any abilities that are currently on cooldown.

7ec55513-3d9c-44c2-9be5-65fd669681f0.Text:
The Officer immediately grants an ally an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} with 2 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and no {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}. Using this ability on themselves will instead give the Officer an additional attack this turn with a -1 AP bonus.
If the ally is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g} and kills an enemy before the end of the Officer's turn, the ally gains a one-time additional +{uip|Momentum|5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f} {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used on the same ally more than once per round.

d58a61f3-7d40-456b-b771-d039cc6e8435.Text:
The Officer immediately grants an ally additional {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} equal to {unit_stat|WarhammerFellowship|bonus}. The target can only use movement abilities, {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}heroic acts{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}desperate measures{/g} during this {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g}. Targeting themselves with this ability will grant the Officer the additional MP only.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:9c78e44bf8ff44a9afff8370c673c9ad}Voice of Command{/g}, it ignores {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} until the end of the Officer's turn.

d34dbdd4-3abb-42d0-94cb-e38047a87c4c.Text: Targets of {g|f:d8008dcfa0004bcca41b26b802d839b2}Move, Move, Move!{/g} gain a +15% {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and a +15% bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover efficiency{/g} until the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
